products.name: Vanilla Tutti Frutti Cake
products.desc: A classic, soft vanilla sponge cake baked perfectly and loaded with colorful candied tutti frutti. A simple, nostalgic favorite that is perfect for birthdays, tea time, and sharing with family.

products.name: Classic Marble Cake
products.desc: The best of both worlds. Rich chocolate and delicate vanilla batters swirled together and baked into a soft, comforting marble cake. Perfect with a hot cup of tea or coffee.

products.name: Chocolate Walnut Cake
products.desc: A deeply rich and fudgy chocolate cake packed with crunchy, toasted walnuts. Made with high-quality cocoa for a pure chocolate flavor that melts in your mouth.

products.name: Classic Vanilla Cupcake
products.desc: A soft, light, and airy vanilla cupcake made with real ingredients. Simple, sweet, and freshly baked every day.

products.name: Chocolate Chip Cupcake
products.desc: A rich chocolate sponge generously loaded with premium chocolate chips. Every bite is filled with a delicious mix of soft cake and melting chocolate.

products.name: Chocolate Ganache Cupcake
products.desc: A beautifully moist chocolate cupcake topped with a thick, rich layer of smooth chocolate ganache. A true treat for chocolate lovers.

products.name: Fresh Pineapple Cupcake
products.desc: A soft vanilla sponge filled with real, tangy pineapple filling and topped with a light pineapple cream. A fresh and fruity favorite.

products.name: Chocolate Strawberry Cupcake
products.desc: A delicious pairing of dark chocolate cake and smooth, sweet strawberry cream. A perfectly balanced flavor for any celebration.

products.name: Choco Lava Cake
products.desc: A warm, soft chocolate cake with a rich, gooey, melted chocolate center that flows out when you cut into it. Best served warm!

products.name: Choco Lava Ganache Cake
products.desc: The ultimate chocolate indulgence. A warm molten lava cake topped with an extra layer of thick, rich chocolate ganache.

products.name: Rasmalai Cupcake
products.desc: A fusion of traditional Indian sweets and classic baking. A soft saffron and cardamom infused cake that tastes just like rich, creamy Rasmalai.

products.name: Fudgy Chocolate Brownie
products.desc: A dense, rich, and incredibly fudgy chocolate brownie with a perfect crinkly top. Made with real butter and premium cocoa.
